arcs.title: The Northern Descent
arcs.summary: The February notes are now fully open. Hempworth's final line ends on 'arguably —' and Steve has admitted he stopped reading there deliberately. Christine has found a second Hempworth survey from November using 'navigable' four more times across an adjacent watershed — the November usage may clarify, contradict, or compound the February ambiguity. Steve is at seven and a half out of ten. The question of whether the northern descent is a practical route is sharpening: Day 4 should deliver the resolution — Christine reconciles the two Hempworth surveys, the practical question of 'dry enough' is answered by going and finding out, and the descent either proves itself or offers something better than proof.
